data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Are Big Earnings Movers After Oil Prices Spike, Fed's Powell Stays
data.description: Stock futures experienced a decline following slumps in Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta after their earnings reports, while Google saw an increase. Oil prices saw a significant surge. Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's decision to remain in his position also impacted the market. The Dow Jones futures were influenced by the performance of major companies like Google, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft, in light of the spike in oil prices and Powell's news.

data.title: Inno Holdings Inc. Announces 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split in Ongoing Nasdaq Compliance Efforts
data.description: Hong Kong, April 29, 2026 - INNO HOLDINGS INC., a Texas-based holding company and electronic products trading company primarily operating in Hong Kong, announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of all its common stock. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors following authorization from the annual stockholders' meeting on March 2, 2026. The company has filed for an amendment to its formation certificate with the Texas Secretary of State to implement the reverse stock split. The effective date for this action is set for May 4, 2026, at 09:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Wallick Investments Celebrates Continued 5-Star Overall Morningstar Rating™ for Inspire Fidelis Multi-Factor ETF (FDLS)
data.description: In Columbia, South Carolina, Inspire Investing's Fidelis Multi-Factor ETF, designed to mirror Wallick Investments, LLC's Fidelis 100 Index, has achieved a prestigious 5-Star Morningstar Rating for its exceptional 3-year risk-adjusted performance. This rating places the ETF in the top tier among 580 US Small-Cap Blend funds as of March 31, 2016. Notably, this marks the Inspire Fidelis ETF's fifth consecutive month of receiving 5 stars. With assets totaling over $190 million as of April 29, 2023, the Fidelis Multi-Factor ETF (FDLS) is a flagship product of Inspire Investing, recognized as the leading provider of Christian ETFs worldwide.

data.title: INLIF LIMITED Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Bid Price Requirement
data.description: In Quanzhou, China, on April 29, 2026, INLIF LIMITED (NASDAQ: INLF) revealed that it had obtained a Compliance Letter from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The letter signified that the company had met the minimum bid price stipulation of $1.00 per share under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). INLIF is involved in the production and distribution of manipulator arms specifically designed for injection molding machines.

data.title: TransAlta Declares Dividends
data.description: The latest announcement came from the Board of Directors of TransAlta Corporation, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol TA and on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TAC. The board declared the quarterly dividend for its Cumulative Redeemable Rate Reset First Preferred Shares. This dividend is for the period beginning from March 31, 2026, and goes up to, but not including, June 30, 2026.

data.title: First Mid Names Matt Smith CEO and President; Joe Dively to Transition to Executive Chairman as Part of Planned Succession
data.description: In Mattoon, Illinois, on April 29, 2026, First Mid Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FMBH) revealed a leadership change in its long-term succession plan. Starting July 1, 2026, Matthew K. Smith, currently the President of the Company, will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer and President of First Mid and First Mid Bank & Trust, N.A. He will also join the Company's Board of Directors. Joseph R. Dively, the current Chairman and CEO, will move into the position of Executive Chairman of the Board.

data.title: Impinj Stock Soars On Strong Q2 Outlook
data.description: Impinj Inc's (NASDAQ: PI) shares are experiencing a significant surge in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the release of the company's robust first-quarter results. Impinj stock is currently one of the standout performers for the day. The surge in PI stock can be attributed to Impinj reporting first-quarter revenue of $74.25 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $72.46 million. The IoT firm also disclosed adjusted earnings of 14 cents per share, aligning with analyst projections. The company expressed satisfaction with its first-quarter performance and detailed that revenues were solid. Total information is obtainable on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SEACOR Marine Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Today, SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. (NYSE: SMHI), a prominent global provider of marine and support transportation services to offshore energy facilities, disclosed its first quarter outcomes for the period ending on March 31, 2026. The company, based in Houston, shared this information via GLOBE NEWSWIRE.

data.title: CORE LAB REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: With a revenue of $121.8 million, experiencing a 12% sequential decline and remaining flat year-over-year, the operating income stood at $1.9 million. Excluding items, the operating income was $6.6 million, down by 58% sequentially and 44% year-over-year. The GAAP loss per share was $0.02, while EPS excluding items amounted to $0.06, marking a 72% sequential decrease and a 58% year-over-year decrease.

data.title: Brera Holdings PLC (d/b/a Solmate Infrastructure) Appoints Ron Sade as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Brera Holdings PLC, trading on Nasdaq as SLMT, known as Solmate Infrastructure, has named Ron Sade as its new CEO, starting on May 1, 2026. Sade, who has been a board member since September 2025, with a background in technology investment and digital infrastructure, is anticipated to bring extensive insight to the company. His appointment is seen as a strategic move by the board, tapping into his leadership skills and industry knowledge.
